channel.title: Kive Apps Blog
channel.description: Essays on privacy, discipline, app craft, and building tools that actually matter.

item.title: Introducing LifeMaster AI — Your Personal Discipline OS
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: After months of obsessive building, we shipped LifeMaster AI — a discipline OS for focus, recovery, and growth. Free, offline, no tracking. Here's the story behind why we built it and what's actually inside.

item.title: Why Privacy Should Be a Default, Not a Feature
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: In a world of data-hungry apps, here's why we chose zero tracking from day one — and why every app should look at its defaults instead of its policies.

item.title: The Art of Building Habits That Actually Stick
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: Most people don't fail at habits because they lack willpower — they fail because they tried to install the wrong habit, in the wrong way, at the wrong time. Five things that actually work.

item.title: Offline-First: Why Our Apps Work Without the Internet
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: Why we ship apps that work on a flight, in a tunnel, in a village with no signal — and the architectural discipline it took to engineer.

item.title: The Psychology of Streaks
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: Why day 30 of a habit feels different from day 3 — and how to use that asymmetry to your advantage without becoming its prisoner.

item.title: How We Built a Coaching Engine Without Cloud AI
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: The unfashionable truth: most apps don't need cloud AI to feel smart. A 200-item content library with a smart picker beats a 200-billion-parameter model that ships your data to a server.

item.title: Building in Public: Our 2025 Year in Review
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: What worked, what didn't, and what we learned in our first year as an indie app studio. The honest version, not the polished one.

item.title: The Hidden Cost of 'Free' Apps
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: A privacy investigation into how "free" productivity apps actually pay their bills. We took 20 of the most popular ones and looked at what they really do.

item.title: Focus Is a Skill, Not a Personality Trait
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: Focus isn't a personality trait you have or don't. It's a trainable skill — and the training is specific, uncomfortable, and works.

item.title: Cold Showers, Cold Mornings: A 30-Day Discipline Experiment
item.dc:creator: Kive Apps
item.description: 30 days of voluntary cold showers. Daily logs and the unvarnished verdict — most "biohacking" claims are oversold; the real benefit is something else entirely.
